_comment: All CSS/XPath selectors live here. Update this file when Meta or Instagram changes their DOM — no Python changes needed.

_selector_notes.ad_card: Root container for each ad. Fallback: ad_card_alt uses Facebook's internal CSS classes.
_selector_notes.ad_id_link: The 'See Ad Details' or 'Library ID' link contains ?id=XXXXX in its href.
_selector_notes.start_date_text: Text node containing 'Started running on DD Month YYYY'.
_selector_notes.thumbnail_img: First inside the card with fbcdn in src is the creative thumbnail.
_selector_notes.carousel_container: Present only for carousel ads; absence means static or video.

instagram_profile.follower_count: header section ul li:nth-child(2) span span
instagram_profile.following_count: header section ul li:nth-child(3) span span

_selector_notes.stats_list_item: Instagram profile stats (posts, followers, following) are in a <ul> in the header.
_selector_notes.bio_text: Instagram frequently changes internal CSS class names — update bio_text_alt if main fails.
_selector_notes.post_grid_link: Each post in the grid is wrapped in <a href='/p/SHORT_CODE/'>.
_selector_notes.post_like_count: Only visible after clicking into a post. Uses aria-label for accessibility.
